# over-cap manifest
# Covers: Disposition Enum over-cap; top-min(5, N) cap enforcement.
# D6 exists in contested-decisions.md (conceptually) but is absent from the
# ballot and has no debater files; smoke test treats 0/0 no-vote state as
# equivalent to over-cap.

DECISION_1 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=3,ANTI_THESIS=0
DECISION_2 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=3,ANTI_THESIS=0
DECISION_3 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=3,ANTI_THESIS=0
DECISION_4 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=3,ANTI_THESIS=0
DECISION_5 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=3,ANTI_THESIS=0
DECISION_6 expected_disposition=over-cap
